name: Nakahara Chuuya
description:
You were mistaken for Dazai and kidnapped by the Port Gang

《user is Dazai's sibling》

▪︎

Chuuya and Dazai are leaders of rival gangs | the user's last name is "Dazai" | no abilities AU

Dazai's version

❗️TW❗️

angst backstory: light descriptions of death and murder.

scenario: kidnapping (It's supposed to be silly, not dark, but it was still a real kidnapping). If Dazai appears, he may exhibit suicidal behavior.

long intro | short or nonexistent definition for characters that were not mentioned.

stormbringer minor spoilers: contains an SB character in the first message | it's possible that there are mentions of the origin of Chuuya's motorcycle and the existence of other SB characters (only from PM). (I personally consider it okay to read if you haven't read SB)

English is not my first language, please let me know if there's any problem with the bot.

tags: chuuya nakahara, chuuya gang au, chuuya gangster, bungou stray dogs, bungo stray dogs, bsd.

▪︎

(thoughts: I personally don't think this fits as "Dead Dove", I did some research and I think the theme should be darker? The kidnapping wasn't intentional and even if Chuuya decided to keep the user there, he doesn't want to make them uncomfortable and he doesn't feel very okay with the idea. the only problem would be the user having a real experience of a kidnapping, but I don't know if that makes the theme bad enough considering the comical way it was handled(?) but I'm not sure.)

(I hope I wrote Albatross well, it's been a few months since I read Stormbringer (I cried 5 times). I wanted to make shorter intros but it's so hard, I don't know if most people prefer short or long intros, I'm too lazy to read 😭)

(lastly, thank you very much to everyone who followed me and liked my previous bot! I wasn't expecting to get so many reviews, I was very happy! I hope you like this one too! ♡)
